head.eyebrow: Wat AI voor jouw bedrijf doet
head.lead: We bouwen AI die daadwerkelijk taken uitvoert — niet alleen adviseert.

featured.title: Sales & Support Automatisering
featured.description: AI die inkomende leads kwalificeert, vragen beantwoordt en opvolging automatiseert. Van eerste contact tot afspraak — zonder handmatig werk.

content.title: Automatische Contentcreatie
content.description: Blogposts, social media, rapportages — AI genereert content in jouw tone-of-voice. Altijd on-brand, altijd op tijd.

data.title: Data & Inzichten
data.description: AI die patronen herkent in je data, rapportages genereert en anomalieën detecteert. Beslissingen op basis van feiten, niet gevoel.

workflow.title: Workflow Integraties
workflow.description: Koppel AI aan je bestaande tools — CRM, e-mail, boekhouding. Alles praat met elkaar, zonder handmatig kopiëren.

head.eyebrow: What AI does for your business
head.lead: We build AI that actually carries out tasks — not just advises.

featured.title: Sales & Support Automation
featured.description: AI that qualifies incoming leads, answers questions and automates follow-up. From first contact to appointment — without manual work.

content.title: Automated Content Creation
content.description: Blog posts, social media, reports — AI generates content in your tone of voice. Always on-brand, always on time.

data.title: Data & Insights
data.description: AI that spots patterns in your data, generates reports and detects anomalies. Decisions based on facts, not gut feeling.

workflow.title: Workflow Integrations
workflow.description: Connect AI to your existing tools — CRM, email, accounting. Everything talks to each other, without manual copying.
